# Scone UI

> React + Tailwind CSS admin UI component library and governance workspace.

Scone UI is a reusable admin UI component package. Use it for forms, data display, layout, feedback, navigation, media components, and admin page patterns. Do not treat it as an application framework, router, request layer, permission model, validation schema source, or product copy source.

## Public URLs

- Docs: https://thundax-lyp.github.io/scone-ui/docs/
- Example: https://thundax-lyp.github.io/scone-ui/example/
- GitHub: https://github.com/thundax-lyp/scone-ui
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/scone-ui

## Read First

- AI usage guide: https://thundax-lyp.github.io/scone-ui/docs/guide/ai-usage/
- Quick start: https://thundax-lyp.github.io/scone-ui/docs/guide/quick-start/
- Component overview: https://thundax-lyp.github.io/scone-ui/docs/components/overview/
- Patterns: https://thundax-lyp.github.io/scone-ui/docs/components/patterns/

## Installed Package Authority

When generating code against an installed package, read these files first:

1. `scone-ui/dist/index.d.ts`
2. `scone-ui/PACKAGE-AI-GUIDE.md`

If documentation conflicts with `dist/index.d.ts`, prefer the installed package type declarations.

## Import Rules

- Import components, patterns, services, hooks, helpers, and types from `scone-ui`.
- Import styles once from `scone-ui/styles.css`.
- Do not import internal shadcn primitives, source paths, alias paths, or undocumented subpaths.
- Use public props types such as `SconeButtonProps` when wrapping components.
- Do not invent public APIs that are not exported by `scone-ui`.

## Main Public APIs

- General: `SconeButton`, `SconeTypography`
- Data entry: `SconeInput`, `SconeNumberInput`, `SconePasswordInput`, `SconeSearchInput`, `SconeSelect`, `SconeCombobox`, `SconeCheckbox`, `SconeRadioGroup`, `SconeForm`, `SconeField`, `SconeFieldGroup`, `SconeFormSection`, `SconeFormActions`
- Data display: `SconeTable`, `SconeDescriptions`, `SconeCard`, `SconeBadge`, `SconeList`, `SconeStatistic`, `SconeTimeline`, `SconeTag`
- Layout: `SconeStack`, `SconeInline`, `SconeCompact`, `SconeToolbar`, `SconeScrollArea`, `SconeSeparator`, `SconeSplitPane`
- Feedback: `SconeAlert`, `SconeDialog`, `SconeDrawer`, `SconeConfirm`, `SconeEmpty`, `SconeLoading`, `SconeProgress`, `SconeToastProvider`, `toast`, `SconeNotificationProvider`, `notification`
- Navigation and media: `SconeTabs`, `SconeDropdown`, `SconeMenu`, `SconeBreadcrumb`, `SconePagination`, `SconeTree`, `SconeCommand`, `SconeTooltip`, `SconeAvatar`, `SconeImage`
- Admin patterns: `AppShell`, `Page`, `Section`, `FilterBar`, `DataTable`

## Optional

- Repository README: https://github.com/thundax-lyp/scone-ui#readme
- Package README: https://www.npmjs.com/package/scone-ui
